case_title: ROSS IRA J VS WILKINSON CAROLE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,311.50 FILED BY ROSS IRA J AS TO DEFENDANT WILKINSON CAROLE PEIRONA THOMAS JR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WILKINSON CAROLE PEIRONA THOMAS JR
